{{CargoRelic
|name=Iridescent Lotus
|class_id=20730
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The lotus pedestal formed by the Iridescent Lotus granted by the Mountain God contains great power and is able to unify the seven Gourd Brothers to defeat all kinds of demons and evil spirits with their combined power.
|fame=17
|art=13
|fth=30
|civ=16
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail All ELMT DMG +1<br>Per Partner you have, Snail HP +10<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss2=Snail All ELMT DMG +2<br>Per Partner you have, Snail HP +20<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss3=Snail All ELMT DMG +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss4=Snail All ELMT DMG +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15
|ss7=Snail All ELMT DMG +3<br>Per Partner you have, Snail HP +30<br>Current Partners: 15/15<br> (Awakened)
}}
